faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Answers to common questions about Converigo's file conversion service.
faq.a1: Converigo supports many formats including images, documents, audio, and video files.
faq.a2: Yes. You can convert files online for free without installing any software.
faq.a3: Yes. Your files are processed safely and are not shared with others.
faq.q4: Do I need to install software?
faq.a4: No. Converigo works directly in your browser on desktop and mobile devices.
faq.q5: Can I convert multiple files at once?
faq.a5: Yes. Converigo supports multiple file uploads for faster conversion workflows.

items.question: What is Converigo?
items.answer: Converigo is a fast online file converter that helps you convert documents, images, audio, and video files without installing software.

items.question: Is Converigo free?
items.answer: Yes, Converigo offers free file conversion so you can quickly transform files without paying for basic conversion tasks.

items.question: Are uploaded files safe?
items.answer: Uploaded files are processed securely and kept only as long as needed to complete the conversion, with privacy and safety in mind.

items.question: What files can Converigo convert?
items.answer: Converigo supports many popular formats for images, documents, audio, and video, so you can convert the files you need quickly.
